headline: MASTER EVERY TEMPERATURE EXCURSION
subheading: A risk-based GDP path from cold-chain alert to defensible disposition and lasting CAPA.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial cold-chain composition for a pharmaceutical quality consultancy, deep navy background dissolving into calm bokeh, a luminous teal and cyan temperature curve rising and dipping across the frame like a data-logger trace, faint threshold band glowing where the line breaches its limit, frosted glass and brushed-steel refrigerated surfaces with delicate condensation and ice-crystal textures catching cool light, softly suggested rows of translucent medicine vials nestled in temperature-controlled packaging fading into shallow depth-of-field, subtle green accent light marking a safe in-range zone, fine particle and frost detailing, premium clinical-luxury mood conveying precision control and reassurance, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
